title: Korbond Double Hook Bra Extender – 3 x 50mm Black Bra Extender – Machine Washable – Increase Bra Size By Up To 8cm – Comfort Fit
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Pack contains: 3 x Black 50mm Bra extender
Korbond 50mm Bra extender fits bras with clasps up to 50mm wide and can increase the size of a bra up to 8cm
Hook and eye fasteners allow extender to attach to existing Bra fastening to gain a more comfortable fit
A perfect solution for tight Fitting bras or general dressmaking purposes. Hook the bra extender into existing Bra hooks and adjust according to required needs
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Bra Extenders Ideal for when weight fluctuates, pregnancy and when in between sizes, Korbond Bra Extenders come in a variety of colours and sizes to help find the perfect fit.
